{{lowercase}}LOL is a [[mantra]] aimed at countering [[absurdity]]. 

It was discovered by [[Kamidere]] at the end of her [[2021 revelation]] alongside [[alo]]. 

== See Also ==

* [[Alo (mantra)]]
* [[Lol mantra]]

[[Category:Mantras]]
[[Category:Absurdity]]
[[sn:Lol]][[Category:2021 revelation]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
